text: I remember my childhood home clearly. My mother and I took the train back every summer, and we stayed with my family while I revisited the neighborhood where I grew up.
Yo recuerdo mi hogar y mis primeros anos. Yo hablaba de mi barrio con mis padres; nosotros visitabamos nuestro pueblo y yo guardaba mis recuerdos.
我记得我的故乡。小时候我们和我的家人住在那里，我从小就常常想念那个家。
Eu lembro da minha familia e da minha casa. Eu cresci com minha mae, meu pai e meus irmaos; quando eu era pequeno, eu sempre voltava para casa.

[Chorus] I remember my home, my home, my home. I remember my family and I remember my childhood, repeated as official audio and karaoke lyrics.
